/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/autocm_engine.dir/link.d -shared  -o autocm_engine.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/autocm_engine.dir/propagator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autocm_engine.dir/conjunction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autocm_engine.dir/maneuver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autocm_engine.dir/bindings.cpp.o
